fileNodes.name: App.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Root application component that configures the React Router, wraps routes with authentication guards and subscription providers, and handles role-based access control for tenant and super-admin users.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Defines ProtectedRoute and DashboardRouter helper components inline to encapsulate guard logic before delegating to page components.

fileNodes.name: AppSidebar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Main application sidebar that renders role-filtered navigation groups with collapsible sections, color-coded icons, and a client-creation dialog trigger.

fileNodes.name: Layout.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Primary authenticated layout wrapping pages in a sidebar provider with a top navigation bar, user avatar dropdown, global search, and logout handling.

fileNodes.name: SuperAdminLayout.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Dedicated layout for the super-admin section, providing the SuperAdminSidebar and a header with a user profile avatar and sign-out button.

fileNodes.name: SuperAdminSidebar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Sidebar navigation component for the super-admin section with links to tenants, users, and overview, adapting its layout to mobile breakpoints.

fileNodes.name: WhatsAppButton.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Floating WhatsApp contact button that opens a dialog with a pre-filled message input and redirects the user to the WhatsApp web chat on submission.

fileNodes.name: collapsible.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Re-exports the Radix UI Collapsible primitive components (Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent) for use throughout the application.

fileNodes.name: separator.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Thin wrapper around the Radix UI Separator primitive that merges custom className props with default orientation styling via the cn utility.

fileNodes.name: sheet.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Slide-in panel (Sheet) component built on Radix UI Dialog, exporting all sub-components including overlay, content, header, footer, title, and description.

fileNodes.name: sidebar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive sidebar UI primitive library providing SidebarProvider context, collapsible rail, full set of layout sub-components, and the useSidebar hook.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Centralizes sidebar state (open/closed, mobile breakpoint, keyboard shortcut) in a React context to keep sub-components decoupled.

fileNodes.name: skeleton.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Minimal Skeleton loading placeholder component that applies an animated pulse CSS class with optional className override.

fileNodes.name: sonner.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Themed Toaster wrapper around the sonner library that reads the current theme to pass to the toast renderer, also re-exporting the toast helper.

fileNodes.name: tooltip.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Re-exports Radix UI Tooltip primitives (Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider) as styled wrappers using the cn utility.

fileNodes.name: use-mobile.tsx
fileNodes.summary: React hook that tracks whether the current viewport width is below the mobile breakpoint (768px) using a matchMedia listener.

fileNodes.name: useAuth.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Authentication hook that listens to Supabase auth state changes to expose the current user, session, loading state, and a signOut helper.

fileNodes.name: useUserRole.ts
fileNodes.summary: Hook that fetches the authenticated user's role(s) from the user_roles table in Supabase and computes capability flags for owner, super-admin, manager, and client access.

fileNodes.name: Dashboard.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Main tenant dashboard page that aggregates KPI statistics, revenue charts, latest invoices, and top clients by fetching data from multiple API modules and Supabase directly.

fileNodes.name: Landing.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Public marketing landing page with hero section, feature highlights, animated revenue chart preview, pricing tiers, and call-to-action buttons for sign-up and login.

fileNodes.name: NotFound.tsx
fileNodes.summary: 404 error page that logs the invalid route to the console and renders a friendly message with a home navigation link.

fileNodes.name: SuperAdmin.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Super-admin overview dashboard displaying global platform statistics — total tenants, clients, revenue, and transactions — fetched via React Query from Supabase.

fileNodes.name: accordion.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Accordion component wrapping Radix UI primitives, exporting Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, and AccordionContent with Tailwind styling.

fileNodes.name: alert.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Alert component providing styled alert boxes with title and description sub-components, supporting variant-based styling via cva.

fileNodes.name: avatar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Avatar component wrapping Radix UI primitives, exporting Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback for user profile images with fallback support.

fileNodes.name: breadcrumb.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Breadcrumb navigation component exporting a full set of sub-components including list, item, link, page, separator, and ellipsis for hierarchical navigation display.

fileNodes.name: chart.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive chart wrapper built on Recharts, providing ChartContainer with context-based theming, dynamic CSS variable injection via ChartStyle, fully-styled tooltip and legend content components, and a utility for resolving payload config.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses React context to share chart config across components and injects CSS custom properties per theme/color key to drive Recharts color tokens.

fileNodes.name: checkbox.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Checkbox component wrapping Radix UI CheckboxPrimitive with Tailwind styling and a check indicator icon.

fileNodes.name: context-menu.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Context Menu component providing a full suite of 15 sub-components wrapping Radix UI ContextMenu primitives, including items, checkboxes, radio items, labels, separators, sub-menus, and keyboard shortcut display.

fileNodes.name: drawer.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Drawer component wrapping vaul's Drawer primitive, exporting a full set of sub-components including overlay, trigger, close, content, header, footer, title, and description.

fileNodes.name: hover-card.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui HoverCard component exporting HoverCard, HoverCardTrigger, and HoverCardContent backed by Radix UI primitives for hover-triggered floating content panels.

fileNodes.name: input-otp.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui OTP input component built on input-otp library, exporting InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, and InputOTPSeparator for one-time password entry flows.

fileNodes.name: menubar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Menubar component providing a full application-style menu bar with 16 sub-components wrapping Radix UI Menubar primitives, including menus, items, checkboxes, radio groups, sub-menus, and keyboard shortcuts.

fileNodes.name: navigation-menu.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui NavigationMenu component exporting 9 sub-components plus a trigger style helper, wrapping Radix UI NavigationMenu primitives for accessible site navigation with viewport and indicator support.

fileNodes.name: progress.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Progress component wrapping Radix UI ProgressPrimitive, rendering an animated progress bar driven by a value prop.

fileNodes.name: radio-group.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui RadioGroup component exporting RadioGroup and RadioGroupItem, wrapping Radix UI primitives with a styled circle indicator for form selection.

fileNodes.name: resizable.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Resizable panel components wrapping react-resizable-panels, exporting ResizablePanelGroup, ResizablePanel, and ResizableHandle with optional visible drag handle.

fileNodes.name: slider.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Slider component wrapping Radix UI SliderPrimitive, rendering a styled range slider with track, range, and thumb sub-elements.

fileNodes.name: toggle-group.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui ToggleGroup component wrapping Radix UI ToggleGroup primitives, using a React context to propagate toggle variant and size to ToggleGroupItem children.

fileNodes.name: toggle.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Toggle component exporting a Toggle button and toggleVariants cva helper, wrapping Radix UI TogglePrimitive with default, outline, and size variant styles.

fileNodes.name: utils.ts
fileNodes.summary: Core utility module exporting the cn helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx for conditional logic and twMerge to resolve conflicts.

fileNodes.name: SignUpForm.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Renders the user registration form with email, password, and business name fields, handling Supabase sign-up, auto sign-in, tenant provisioning via edge function, and password strength feedback.

fileNodes.name: AddSalesDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Modal dialog for recording a new sale for a client, supporting both product selection from existing inventory and inline product creation, then generating an invoice and sale record.

fileNodes.name: ClientDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Modal dialog for creating or editing a client record, including automatic PIN generation for new clients and optional creation of an associated client user account.

fileNodes.name: SimpleTopUpDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Modal dialog that allows recording a payment top-up against a client's unpaid invoices, showing current balance, outstanding amount, and per-invoice balance calculations.

fileNodes.name: InvoiceDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive modal dialog for creating and editing invoices, supporting client and product selection with popovers, auto-filled amounts, transaction recording, and in-app notifications on creation.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Directly queries Supabase from the component for transaction insertion alongside the mutation hooks, showing a hybrid data-access pattern.

fileNodes.name: calendar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Thin shadcn/ui wrapper around the react-day-picker DayPicker component, applying project-consistent Tailwind class names via cn() and buttonVariants.

fileNodes.name: form.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui form primitives built on react-hook-form, exporting Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage, and the useFormField hook for consistent form layout and error display.

fileNodes.name: input.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Input primitive — a styled HTML input element with consistent focus, disabled, and placeholder styles via cn().

fileNodes.name: label.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Label primitive wrapping Radix UI's LabelPrimitive with peer-disabled styling for accessibility-compliant form labels.

fileNodes.name: popover.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Popover primitives re-exporting Radix UI's Popover, PopoverTrigger, and a styled PopoverContent with animation and positioning classes.

fileNodes.name: select.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Select component set re-exporting all Radix UI Select primitives (Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, etc.) with Tailwind styling and scroll buttons.

fileNodes.name: textarea.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Textarea primitive — a styled HTML textarea element with consistent resize, focus, and placeholder styles.

fileNodes.name: useClients.ts
fileNodes.summary: Collection of React Query hooks for the clients domain, providing data fetching (useClients, useClient) and mutations with optimistic updates for create, update, delete, balance update, and client-user provisioning.

fileNodes.name: useInvoices.ts
fileNodes.summary: Collection of React Query hooks for the invoices domain, providing fetching hooks (useInvoices, useInvoicesByClient, useInvoice, useGenerateInvoiceNumber) and optimistic-update mutations for create, update, and delete.

fileNodes.name: useTransactions.ts
fileNodes.summary: Collection of React Query hooks for the transactions domain, providing fetching by client/invoice, paid-amount aggregation, and mutations for recording payments and sales.

fileNodes.name: queryClient.ts
fileNodes.summary: Configures and exports the shared TanStack Query client instance with default staleTime/gcTime settings, and exports the queryKeys registry used across all data hooks.
fileNodes.languageNotes: queryKeys acts as a centralized query key factory, preventing cache key drift across hooks.

fileNodes.name: main.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Application entry point that mounts the React root, wrapping the App component with the shared QueryClientProvider.

fileNodes.name: Clients.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Clients page component that lists clients with live search filtering, manages the create/edit dialog lifecycle, and renders loading skeletons, the clients table, and a feature-gated add button.

fileNodes.name: FeatureGate.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Conditional rendering wrapper that gates UI content behind subscription plan feature flags, showing upgrade prompts or hiding content based on the user's current plan.

fileNodes.name: NotificationDropdown.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Dropdown notification center component displaying unread count badge, notification list with mark-as-read and delete actions, and navigation on click.

fileNodes.name: ClientActions.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Action menu component for individual client rows, providing edit, top-up, sales, transactions, status toggle, and delete operations with subscription-gated feature checks.

fileNodes.name: ClientSalesDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Dialog component displaying a client's sales history, invoice listing, balance summary, and account activation capability, with direct Supabase queries for invoice fetching.

fileNodes.name: ProductDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Form dialog for creating and editing products, managing form state for name, description, price, and stock fields with create/update mutation dispatch.

fileNodes.name: ProductsTable.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Responsive products table component with card-based mobile view and tabular desktop view, supporting edit and delete actions with confirmation dialog.

fileNodes.name: alert-dialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui alert dialog primitive wrapping Radix UI AlertDialog with styled overlay, content, header, footer, title, description, action, and cancel sub-components.

fileNodes.name: button.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Button component using cva for variant and size styling, exporting both the component and the variant helper for use in other components.

fileNodes.name: carousel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Embla Carousel integration providing Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, and navigation button components with a context-based useCarousel hook.

fileNodes.name: dropdown-menu.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Dropdown Menu primitives wrapping Radix UI DropdownMenu with 15 styled sub-components including items, labels, separators, sub-menus, and keyboard shortcuts.

fileNodes.name: empty-state.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Generic empty state UI component displaying an icon, title, description, and optional action button, with optional feature prop integration.

fileNodes.name: pagination.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Pagination UI component set including Pagination container, content, item, link, previous/next navigation, and ellipsis sub-components built on Button variants.

fileNodes.name: useProducts.ts
fileNodes.summary: Collection of React Query hooks for product CRUD operations, implementing optimistic updates on create, update, and delete with toast notifications and cache invalidation.

fileNodes.name: Invoices.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Invoices page component providing a full invoice management UI with loading skeletons, an invoice table, create/edit dialog, and feature-gated access control.

fileNodes.name: Products.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Products page component that renders the product catalog with loading skeletons, edit dialog, and feature-gated create/manage controls.

fileNodes.name: DeleteConfirmDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Shared reusable delete confirmation dialog requiring the user to type a confirmation value before the destructive action is enabled, with optional loading state.

fileNodes.name: clients.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides full CRUD operations and financial helpers for client records in the multi-tenant platform, including balance updates, enriched client-detail queries joining invoices and transactions, and a phone/PIN-based client user creation via Supabase Edge Functions.

fileNodes.name: invoices.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Exposes tenant-scoped CRUD operations for invoices with joined product data, plus a sequential invoice-number generator that derives the next number from the most recent invoice.

fileNodes.name: notifications.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides CRUD and read-state operations for user notifications in Supabase, automatically associating new notifications with the authenticated user's tenant profile.

fileNodes.name: payments.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Manages tenant-scoped CRUD operations for payment_details records, including filtering to only active payment methods.

fileNodes.name: products.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides tenant-scoped CRUD and ILIKE-based search operations for product records via Supabase.

fileNodes.name: tenant.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Shared utility module that resolves the current authenticated user's tenant ID and user record from Supabase, used as a foundation by all other API modules.

fileNodes.name: transactions.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Handles creation and querying of payment and sale transactions for the tenant, with SMS notification dispatch via Supabase Edge Functions after successful transaction recording.

fileNodes.name: ClientTransactionsDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: React dialog component that displays a client's full transaction and invoice history with running totals, loading skeletons, and per-row status badges fetched directly from Supabase.

fileNodes.name: useGlobalSearch.ts
fileNodes.summary: React hook that debounces a search query and runs parallel Supabase ILIKE queries across clients, invoices, and products, returning a unified list of typed search result objects.

fileNodes.name: useNotifications.ts
fileNodes.summary: Collection of React Query hooks for managing notifications — fetching, marking read/unread, deleting, and creating — with real-time Supabase channel subscriptions that auto-invalidate the query cache.

fileNodes.name: client.ts
fileNodes.summary: Initializes and exports a singleton Supabase client instance configured with the project URL and anon key, serving as the shared data access entry point for the entire application.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses createClient from @supabase/supabase-js; exported as a named singleton so all modules share one connection pool.

fileNodes.name: types.ts
fileNodes.summary: Auto-generated Supabase type definitions covering all database tables, enums, views, and functions, providing end-to-end type safety for all Supabase client interactions throughout the project.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Generated file — contains a large Database type with nested Row, Insert, and Update shapes for every table, plus a Constants export with enum values.

fileNodes.name: useTenant.ts
fileNodes.summary: Shared React hooks that wrap React Query to reactively resolve the current user's tenant ID and profile, reusing the imperative API from tenant.api.ts in a hook-friendly form.

fileNodes.name: UnifiedLoginForm.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Provides a unified login form component supporting both email/password authentication and password reset via Supabase edge functions and client-side auth, with zod-validated react-hook-form forms and tabbed UI.

fileNodes.name: ClientTopUpDialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Dialog component allowing clients to top up their account balance by displaying active payment method details (e.g., M-Pesa Paybill, Till, account number) with clipboard-copy support.

fileNodes.name: card.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable shadcn/ui Card primitive providing Card, CardHeader, CardFooter, CardTitle, CardDescription, and CardContent components styled with TailwindCSS utility classes.

fileNodes.name: dialog.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable shadcn/ui Dialog primitive wrapping Radix UI Dialog with styled overlay, content, header, footer, title, and description sub-components.

fileNodes.name: scroll-area.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable shadcn/ui ScrollArea and ScrollBar primitives wrapping Radix UI ScrollArea for custom-styled scrollable regions.

fileNodes.name: switch.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable shadcn/ui Switch toggle primitive wrapping Radix UI Switch with TailwindCSS styling.

fileNodes.name: tabs.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable shadcn/ui Tabs primitive providing Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, and TabsContent components wrapping Radix UI Tabs with TailwindCSS styling.

fileNodes.name: usePayments.ts
fileNodes.summary: Custom React Query hooks for full CRUD lifecycle of payment details (paybill, till, account), exporting usePaymentDetails, useActivePaymentDetails, useCreatePaymentDetail, useUpdatePaymentDetail, and useDeletePaymentDetail.

fileNodes.name: Auth.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Authentication page that renders a split-layout with UnifiedLoginForm or SignUpForm based on active tab, redirecting authenticated users away, and displaying feature highlights for unauthenticated visitors.

fileNodes.name: ClientDashboard.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Client-facing dashboard page displaying the client's invoices, payment history, account balance, and a top-up dialog; fetches data from clients, invoices, and transactions APIs via Supabase and provides invoice detail drill-down.

fileNodes.name: Payments.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Admin payment-settings page for managing business payment method details (M-Pesa Paybill, Till, etc.); supports create, edit, delete, and active-toggle operations via React Query hooks and renders both list and card view layouts.

fileNodes.name: SuperAdminTenants.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Super-admin tenant management page providing a searchable list of tenants with per-tenant detail drill-down showing staff, clients, revenue stats, and controls for toggling tenant active status, changing subscription tier, and purging tenant data.

fileNodes.name: profile.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides Supabase-backed API functions for fetching and updating the authenticated user's profile record from the profiles table.

fileNodes.name: subscription.api.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides subscription management API functions including status retrieval, Paystack payment initialization, subscription cancellation, and billing history retrieval via Supabase.

fileNodes.name: SubscriptionGuard.tsx
fileNodes.summary: React component that conditionally renders its children based on subscription validity, redirecting unauthenticated or expired-subscription users to appropriate pages.

fileNodes.name: TrialBanner.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Dismissible alert banner component that notifies users about their remaining trial days and prompts them to upgrade to a paid plan.

fileNodes.name: SubscriptionProvider.tsx
fileNodes.summary: React context provider that loads and exposes subscription state for the current tenant, computing derived flags such as trial days remaining, feature access, and plan identifiers.

fileNodes.name: SubscriptionContext.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Defines and exports the React SubscriptionContext used to share subscription state across the component tree.

fileNodes.name: useSubscription.ts
fileNodes.summary: Custom React hook that consumes SubscriptionContext and throws an error if called outside of a SubscriptionProvider, ensuring safe access to subscription state.

fileNodes.name: featureFlags.ts
fileNodes.summary: Defines and exports static configuration maps for subscription plan features (PLAN_FEATURES), human-readable plan labels (PLAN_LABELS), and plan pricing (PLAN_PRICES) used throughout the application.

fileNodes.name: paystackConfig.ts
fileNodes.summary: Exports a paystackConfig object containing Paystack public key and plan codes for each subscription tier, sourced from environment variables.

fileNodes.name: Settings.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Full-featured settings page that allows users to view and edit their profile, manage their subscription status and cancellation, and review billing history across tabbed sections.

fileNodes.name: Subscription.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Subscription management page where users can view their current plan, compare available plans with feature lists, enter a payment email, and initiate a Paystack checkout for plan upgrades.

fileNodes.name: GlobalSearch.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Modal global search component that listens for keyboard shortcuts, queries all project entities via useGlobalSearch, groups results by type, and navigates to the selected item's detail page.

fileNodes.name: ClientRow.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Renders a single client record as a table row, displaying formatted dates, currency amounts, and inline action buttons via ClientActions.

fileNodes.name: ClientsTable.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Full-featured clients table component with desktop and mobile views, summary statistics row, pagination, and per-row action delegation to ClientRow.

fileNodes.name: InvoicesTable.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Large invoice management table component with desktop and mobile layouts supporting PDF download, PDF print, WhatsApp sharing, edit, and delete operations via Supabase queries.

fileNodes.name: badge.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable shadcn/ui Badge component with variant styles (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built on class-variance-authority.

fileNodes.name: command.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Command palette primitive providing Command, CommandDialog, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandSeparator, and CommandShortcut subcomponents built on cmdk.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Wraps the cmdk library with shadcn styling conventions; CommandDialog composes the Dialog primitive to render a full-screen command modal.

fileNodes.name: table.tsx
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui Table primitive exporting all structural subcomponents: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableHead, TableRow, TableCell, and TableCaption.

fileNodes.name: pdfGenerator.ts
fileNodes.summary: Invoice PDF generation library using jsPDF and jspdf-autotable; exposes generateInvoicePDF for building the document, downloadInvoicePDF for browser download, and printInvoicePDF for silent browser print.

fileNodes.name: whatsapp.ts
fileNodes.summary: Client-side WhatsApp integration utilities that format phone numbers and open wa.me deep-links to send pre-composed invoice notifications or generic messages.

fileNodes.name: SuperAdminUsers.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Super-admin management page that lists all super-admin users, enables global profile search across tenants, and allows promoting users to the super-admin role via Supabase mutations.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Minimal barrel file re-exporting shared utility helpers (formatDate, formatCurrency) for use across the application.

fileNodes.name: toast.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Defines the full set of Radix UI-based toast primitive components — ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast, ToastAction, ToastClose, ToastTitle, and ToastDescription — styled with CVA variants (default and destructive) and TailwindCSS.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses React.forwardRef for all components, class-variance-authority for variant management, and re-exports Radix UI primitives with custom Tailwind styling.

fileNodes.name: toaster.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Renders the active toast notifications by consuming the useToast hook and mapping over the current toast state to display Toast, ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastClose, and ToastAction components.

fileNodes.name: use-toast.ts
fileNodes.summary: Thin re-export barrel that proxies the useToast hook and toast imperative function from src/hooks/use-toast.ts, maintaining a shadcn-compatible import path at the UI component layer.

fileNodes.name: use-toast.ts
fileNodes.summary: Implements the complete client-side toast notification system: a Redux-style reducer managing ADD, UPDATE, DISMISS, and REMOVE actions against an in-memory singleton state, an imperative toast() factory function, and a useToast React hook that subscribes components to that state.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses a module-level singleton (memoryState + listeners array) instead of React context, allowing the toast() function to be called outside React components while still synchronizing with subscribed components via useEffect.

fileNodes.name: main.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on every push to main, builds the Vite/React project, and force-pushes the compiled dist output to a dedicated dist branch for deployment.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses an orphan-branch strategy to keep built assets isolated from source history; force-pushes to origin/dist on every main push.

fileNodes.name: deploy-dist
fileNodes.summary: Single CI job running on ubuntu-latest that checks out the repo, installs Node 18 dependencies, builds the project, and publishes the dist output to the dist branch via force-push.

fileNodes.name: tenants
fileNodes.summary: Core tenants table representing business organizations in the multi-tenant platform, with phone number uniqueness constraints and timestamps.

fileNodes.name: profiles
fileNodes.summary: User profile records linked to both auth users and tenants, storing display name and contact information with phone validation.

fileNodes.name: user_roles
fileNodes.summary: Join table assigning app_role enum values (admin, user) to auth users, with a unique constraint per user-role pair.

fileNodes.name: clients
fileNodes.summary: Client records scoped to a tenant, tracking contact information, account balance, and status with phone format validation.

fileNodes.name: products
fileNodes.summary: Product catalog entries scoped to a tenant with name, price, and optional description.

fileNodes.name: invoices
fileNodes.summary: Invoice records linking tenants and clients with invoice number uniqueness per tenant, amount, status, and optional notes.

fileNodes.name: transactions
fileNodes.summary: Financial transaction records of type 'sale' or 'payment', linked to tenant, client, and optionally an invoice.

fileNodes.name: 20251013111652_2112e2fa-4ab5-4a26-a099-668c9c53e422.sql
fileNodes.summary: Initial schema migration establishing the core multi-tenant data model: tenants, profiles, user_roles, clients, products, invoices, and transactions tables with RLS policies, helper functions, and performance indexes.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) with SECURITY DEFINER helper functions to enforce tenant isolation at the database layer.

fileNodes.name: 20251013111722_13b9afc3-22a7-4486-ad66-df27906b1a62.sql
fileNodes.summary: Security fix migration that patches the update_updated_at_column trigger function to set search_path, closing a potential schema injection vulnerability.

fileNodes.name: 20251015063134_57ca11aa-1900-4de9-b6e3-a67c3e774699.sql
fileNodes.summary: Alters the clients table to make phone_number required and name/email optional, and adds a unique constraint on phone_number per tenant.

fileNodes.name: 20251015122022_1a3c4a0d-bf79-4c4b-b95d-6d5096f663f5.sql
fileNodes.summary: Creates the client_details view joining clients, invoices, and transactions to expose total_invoiced and total_paid aggregates, and adds several performance indexes.

fileNodes.name: 20251015122229_ff79d4e9-c23c-4fef-ba7d-4aa635163522.sql
fileNodes.summary: Recreates the client_details view with security_invoker = true so it respects the querying user's RLS policies rather than bypassing them.

fileNodes.name: 20251015130904_73b74a13-ff7b-47c7-90e7-1740050ff2f2.sql
fileNodes.summary: Adds the 'client' value to the app_role enum to support client-facing authenticated access.

fileNodes.name: 20251015190746_375e4b33-ba67-41ef-9624-7c1dbafc120d.sql
fileNodes.summary: Introduces the update_client_status trigger function to automatically recalculate and update a client's status (open/closed) after any change to invoices or transactions.

fileNodes.name: 20251015190810_5faec757-77c9-4fcb-8440-590ca6deeeb0.sql
fileNodes.summary: Security fix that drops and recreates the update_client_status function and its triggers with SECURITY DEFINER and a fixed search_path.

fileNodes.name: 20251015192346_18fd6657-87d2-4dd8-8195-616e9ea7ba81.sql
fileNodes.summary: Further refines the update_client_status function by adding it to the public schema with proper SECURITY DEFINER and search_path settings.

fileNodes.name: 20251016065143_82266887-cad1-4150-a5c9-496b797340e2.sql
fileNodes.summary: Adds an optional product_id foreign key column to the invoices table to support product-linked invoices, with a performance index.

fileNodes.name: 20251016070618_b0505774-97b8-4d57-af3c-d1e33afa64fe.sql
fileNodes.summary: Extends the invoices table status column to accept 'partial' as a valid value alongside pending, paid, and overdue, using a check constraint.

fileNodes.name: notifications
fileNodes.summary: Notifications table storing per-user, per-tenant alerts for invoice, payment, client, product, and system events with read status and deep-link support.

fileNodes.name: 20251016072528_a8fe3e42-6dd3-4a3e-8aa5-900e7c62d2a5.sql
fileNodes.summary: Creates the notifications table with RLS policies, an updated_at trigger, performance indexes, and enables Supabase Realtime for the table.

fileNodes.name: 20251018093444_5d49a42c-309b-46b4-9222-293cf07bf193.sql
fileNodes.summary: Adds client-facing RLS policies to invoices and clients tables so authenticated clients can view their own records based on a phone number encoded in their JWT email.

fileNodes.name: payment_details
fileNodes.summary: Payment configuration table for tenants to store M-Pesa Paybill and Till payment options with active/inactive toggles.

fileNodes.name: 20251104064235_55f253d9-d7ff-40ea-baef-a0ebbfd26698.sql
fileNodes.summary: Creates the payment_details table with RLS policies for tenant admins and clients to view active payment options (M-Pesa Paybill/Till), plus an updated_at trigger.

fileNodes.name: 20251109131639_345e95b5-dfd7-47ac-a35e-8854ca4ef7a3.sql
fileNodes.summary: Updates client-facing RLS policies on clients, invoices, and payment_details tables to use a new tenant-specific email format that encodes both phone and tenant ID.

fileNodes.name: 20251221141116_3d237c03-d4ca-465d-92ce-68afd17f286c.sql
fileNodes.summary: Adds the update_invoice_status_on_payment trigger function implementing a pending → partial → paid state machine, fired after any transaction change.

fileNodes.name: 20251221141143_e23df4d7-cc88-4e9c-8d7f-7efc30e20e4f.sql
fileNodes.summary: Implements domain event-driven notification triggers: create_payment_notification fires after each payment transaction and create_invoice_notification fires after each invoice insert, writing records to the notifications table.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Follows a Domain Event pattern in plpgsql — each trigger represents a named business event (PaymentReceived, InvoiceCreated) rather than a raw table mutation.

fileNodes.name: 20260127155500_add_superadmin_role.sql
fileNodes.summary: Adds 'superadmin' to the app_role enum and updates RLS policies on tenants, profiles, and user_roles so superadmins can read all rows across all tenants.

fileNodes.name: 20260127203127_add_subscription_tiers.sql
fileNodes.summary: Introduces the subscription_tier enum (monthly, semi-annual, annual) and adds subscription_tier and is_active columns to the tenants table; also grants superadmins visibility over all transactions and invoices.

fileNodes.name: 20260127224000_superadmin_rls_expansion.sql
fileNodes.summary: Expands superadmin SELECT visibility to the clients, products, and invoices tables by replacing tenant-scoped policies with has_role-gated alternatives.

fileNodes.name: 20260127230000_comprehensive_superadmin_rls.sql
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive RLS expansion ensuring superadmins can SELECT across all core tables: profiles, clients, products, invoices, transactions, and user_roles.

fileNodes.name: 20260127233000_superadmin_tenant_update_rls.sql
fileNodes.summary: Grants superadmins UPDATE access on the tenants table for managing activation state and subscription tiers.

fileNodes.name: 20260128110000_superadmin_user_management_rls.sql
fileNodes.summary: Grants superadmins full CRUD access on user_roles and refines the profile SELECT policy, also adding a foreign key from user_roles.user_id to profiles.user_id.

fileNodes.name: 20260326193736_673b14aa-788f-45bf-ab5a-f29852d47dc2.sql
fileNodes.summary: Replaces the get_user_tenant_id helper function using the updated SET search_path TO syntax for improved security compliance.

fileNodes.name: 20260327214000_add_profile_email.sql
fileNodes.summary: Adds an optional email column to the profiles table to store the user's real email address for transactions and notifications.

fileNodes.name: subscription_billing_history
fileNodes.summary: Billing history table recording Paystack subscription events (charge.success, invoice.payment_failed, etc.) per tenant with reference, amount, and status.

fileNodes.name: 20260328192957_add_subscription_billing_history.sql
fileNodes.summary: Creates the subscription_billing_history table with RLS so each tenant sees only their own billing events, plus indexes for fast lookup by tenant and Paystack reference.

fileNodes.name: .env
fileNodes.summary: Environment variable file configuring runtime secrets for Supabase (URL, project ID, API key), Paystack payment gateway (test and production keys, plan codes for monthly/6-month/12-month tiers), Africa's Talking SMS credentials, and superadmin email.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Project overview for Nunua Polepole — a multi-tenant business directory and credit management platform. Covers core features, superadmin capabilities, local development setup, and the technology stack (Vite, React, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, Supabase).

fileNodes.name: components.json
fileNodes.summary: shadcn/ui CLI configuration specifying default style, TSX mode, Tailwind setup (config path, CSS entry, slate base color, CSS variables), and path aliases for components, utils, ui, lib, and hooks directories.

fileNodes.name: index.html
fileNodes.summary: Vite SPA entry HTML document for LipiaPolePole credit management system. Declares viewport, favicon, Open Graph and Twitter card metadata, Google Fonts imports (Outfit + Plus Jakarta Sans), and the root div that bootstraps src/main.tsx.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: Node.js project manifest defining build scripts (dev, build, lint, preview), runtime dependencies (React, Radix UI primitives, Supabase JS client, Tanstack Query, Paystack, Recharts, Zod, React Hook Form), and dev dependencies (Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint).

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the React application source targeting ES2020 with react-jsx transform, bundler module resolution, the @/* path alias mapped to src/*, noEmit enabled, and strict mode disabled to allow gradual type safety adoption.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.json
fileNodes.summary: Root TypeScript project file using composite project references to delegate compilation to tsconfig.app.json (src/ application code) and tsconfig.node.json (Vite config tooling), with shared loose compiler options and the @/* path alias.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for Vite's Node.js tooling (vite.config.ts), using bundler module resolution with ESNext target and composite project reference support.

fileNodes.name: vercel.json
fileNodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration with a catch-all rewrite rule that redirects all routes to index.html, enabling client-side routing for the React SPA.

fileNodes.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive domain-driven architecture guide for the Lipia Pole Pole credit management platform, covering 15 sections including bounded contexts, entity relationships, state machines, multi-tenancy patterns, authentication/authorization with RBAC, API layer patterns, error handling, and coding conventions.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses Mermaid diagrams for ERD and state machines, and defines a Ubiquitous Language glossary — a DDD practice ensuring consistent terminology across code and documentation.

fileNodes.name: DEVELOPER.md
fileNodes.summary: Developer-focused guide covering the multi-tenant SaaS architecture, database ERD with key tables, project directory structure, and step-by-step instructions for adding database migrations, new API endpoints, and Supabase Edge Functions.

fileNodes.name: ROLES.md
fileNodes.summary: Reference document for the platform's role-based access control (RBAC) system, defining the four-tier role hierarchy (Superadmin, Owner, Staff, Client), their respective permissions, and how roles are enforced at both the Supabase RLS database layer and the React frontend layer.

fileNodes.name: tenants
fileNodes.summary: Root multi-tenant entity storing business identity, status, subscription tier, and soft-delete metadata. All other tenant-scoped tables cascade from this table via foreign key.

fileNodes.name: profiles
fileNodes.summary: Links Supabase auth users to their tenant, storing display name and phone number with format validation constraints.

fileNodes.name: clients
fileNodes.summary: Stores business clients per tenant with contact details, running balance, and status. Phone number is unique per tenant.

fileNodes.name: products
fileNodes.summary: Catalog of products or services offered by a tenant, with name, price, and optional description.

fileNodes.name: invoices
fileNodes.summary: Records invoices issued by a tenant to a client for a product, with status lifecycle (pending/paid/partial/overdue) and unique invoice numbers per tenant.

fileNodes.name: transactions
fileNodes.summary: Captures financial transactions (sales or payments) per tenant-client pair, optionally linked to an invoice.

fileNodes.name: notifications
fileNodes.summary: In-app notification records for tenant users, supporting invoice, payment, client, product, and system event types.

fileNodes.name: payment_details
fileNodes.summary: Stores per-tenant M-Pesa payment configuration entries (paybill, till, or account number) with active/inactive status.

fileNodes.name: user_roles
fileNodes.summary: Associates auth users with application roles (admin, user, client, superadmin) with uniqueness enforced per user-role pair.

fileNodes.name: super_admins
fileNodes.summary: Registry of platform-level super and support administrators, identified by user_id and email, with active status and last login tracking.

fileNodes.name: super_admin_audit_logs
fileNodes.summary: Immutable audit trail for super admin actions, capturing action type, affected resource, tenant, IP address, and user agent for governance.

fileNodes.name: tenant_subscriptions
fileNodes.summary: Tracks per-tenant subscription plan (free/pro/enterprise) with usage limits for users, clients, invoices, and products, plus billing lifecycle dates.

fileNodes.name: tenant_feature_flags
fileNodes.summary: Per-tenant feature flag toggles enabling runtime feature gating by flag name without code deploys.

fileNodes.name: tenant_usage_metrics
fileNodes.summary: Periodic usage snapshots per tenant recording user, client, invoice, and transaction counts alongside API calls and storage bytes for billing and analytics.

fileNodes.name: recreate_database.sql
fileNodes.summary: Complete Supabase database recreation script defining all 14 tables, 5 ENUM types, 1 view, 42 indexes, Row Level Security policies, and 15+ PL/pgSQL functions and triggers for the multi-tenant platform. Includes super admin governance, subscription management, and automated business logic triggers.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses Supabase-specific patterns including auth.uid(), auth.jwt(), SECURITY DEFINER functions, and RLS policies. PL/pgSQL triggers maintain denormalized running balances and invoice statuses automatically.

fileNodes.name: tenants (trial column)
fileNodes.summary: Migration target: adds trial_ends_at column to tenants with a 7-day default and backfills existing rows.

fileNodes.name: tenant_subscriptions (paystack columns)
fileNodes.summary: Migration target: adds Paystack integration columns (customer code, subscription code, next payment date, cancellation timestamp) to tenant_subscriptions.

fileNodes.name: add_subscription_columns.sql
fileNodes.summary: Additive migration extending the subscription model with trial period tracking on tenants and Paystack payment gateway fields on tenant_subscriptions. Includes trigger and helper function for automated trial assignment.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION with SECURITY DEFINER and a BEFORE INSERT trigger to auto-assign trials on tenant creation. The get_tenant_subscription_status function returns a 4-state enum string: trial, active, cancelled, or expired.

fileNodes.name: config.toml
fileNodes.summary: Supabase project configuration specifying the project ID and disabling JWT verification for four Edge Functions: reset-password, resolve-login-email, create-client-user, and send-transaction-sms.
fileNodes.languageNotes: verify_jwt = false on these functions allows unauthenticated invocation, which is required for signup flows and SMS delivery that run before a session exists.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Ignore rules for the understand-anything knowledge graph tool, listing file patterns (binaries, build artifacts, lockfiles, temp files) to exclude from codebase analysis.

fileNodes.name: bun.lockb
fileNodes.summary: Binary lockfile generated by the Bun package manager, pinning exact dependency versions for reproducible installs across environments.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Bun's lockb format is a binary lockfile and cannot be diffed as plain text; it is managed exclusively by the Bun CLI.

fileNodes.name: eslint.config.js
fileNodes.summary: ESLint flat configuration enabling TypeScript-ESLint recommended rules, React Hooks linting, and React Refresh component-export warnings for the project's TypeScript and TSX files.

fileNodes.name: postcss.config.js
fileNodes.summary: PostCSS configuration file wiring in Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for CSS processing during the Vite build pipeline.

fileNodes.name: robots.txt
fileNodes.summary: Robots exclusion file allowing all web crawlers unrestricted access to the site, with a sitemap reference pointing to the production domain.

fileNodes.name: App.css
fileNodes.summary: Root application CSS file providing base styles for the app container, logo animations, and card layout utilities used at the top-level component level.

fileNodes.name: aspect-ratio.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Thin re-export of the Radix UI AspectRatio primitive, exposing it as a named export for use in the project's shadcn/ui component library.

fileNodes.name: index.css
fileNodes.summary: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS base/components/utilities directives, CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, fonts), and dark mode theme tokens.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses CSS custom properties (HSL color variables) consumed by Tailwind and shadcn/ui component theming; dark mode is toggled via the .dark class on the root element.

fileNodes.name: currency.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides currency formatting and parsing utilities that localize monetary amounts and convert formatted currency strings back to numeric values.

fileNodes.name: date.ts
fileNodes.summary: Provides date formatting helpers for displaying dates in long, short, and human-readable relative formats (e.g., '2 days ago') throughout the application.

fileNodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
fileNodes.summary: Vite environment type declaration file that references Vite's client type definitions, enabling IntelliSense for import.meta.env and other Vite globals.

fileNodes.name: cli-latest
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the latest Supabase CLI version used with this project.

fileNodes.name: gotrue-version
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the GoTrue (authentication service) version for the local Supabase stack.

fileNodes.name: pooler-url
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file storing the connection pooler URL for the linked Supabase project.

fileNodes.name: postgres-version
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the PostgreSQL version in use for the linked Supabase project.

fileNodes.name: project-ref
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file storing the project reference ID for the linked remote Supabase project.

fileNodes.name: rest-version
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the PostgREST (REST API service) version for the local Supabase stack.

fileNodes.name: storage-migration
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file tracking the applied storage migration version for the local Supabase stack.

fileNodes.name: storage-version
fileNodes.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the Supabase Storage service version for the local stack.

fileNodes.name: fix_sql.py
fileNodes.summary: One-off Python utility script that reorders sections 7 and 8 in the recreate_database.sql file, swapping the positions of RLS policies and database functions sections.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that creates a new tenant-scoped client user via the Supabase Admin API, handling idempotent upsert of auth user, profile, and role records, with rollback on failure and post-creation notifications via Telegram and Africa's Talking SMS.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Runs in Deno on Supabase Edge Functions; uses Zod for input validation and constructs tenant-specific synthetic emails (phoneNumber-tenantId@client.internal) to allow multiple tenants to share phone numbers.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function restricted to superadmins that performs a cascading hard-delete of a tenant and all related data (transactions, payments, invoices, products, clients, subscriptions, user roles, profiles, and auth users) in FK-safe order.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Runs in Deno; uses both an anon client (for caller authentication) and a service-role admin client (for privileged deletions), verifying superadmin role before proceeding.

fileNodes.name: deno.json
fileNodes.summary: Deno configuration file for Supabase Edge Functions that pins the Deno standard library import map to version 0.177.0.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that cancels a Paystack subscription by fetching its secure email token and sending a disable request to the Paystack API, supporting both test and production environments.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that initializes a Paystack subscription payment, applying prorated credit when a tenant upgrades mid-cycle, creating Paystack customers on demand, and returning a checkout authorization URL.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Implements proration logic by computing remaining days on the current subscription and calculating a daily rate from hardcoded Paystack plan code fragments; runs in Deno with Supabase service-role client access.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that handles Paystack webhook events for subscription lifecycle management, including charge success, subscription creation, invoice payments, and cancellations. Verifies HMAC-SHA512 signatures, manages plan upgrades/downgrades with proration, logs billing history, and syncs tenant feature flags and usage metrics.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Deno Edge Function using Paystack HMAC-SHA512 signature verification; handles prorated plan switches by programmatically calling the Paystack REST API to disable old subscriptions and create new ones.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that resets user passwords by generating a random 6-digit PIN, looking up user accounts by phone number via the profiles table, updating all matched user accounts, and sending the PIN via Africa's Talking SMS API with allowlist enforcement.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses Deno crypto.getRandomValues for cryptographically secure PIN generation; phone number allowlist supports wildcard ('*') for all numbers or comma-separated list with Kenyan phone number variant matching (0xxx / +254xxx).

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that resolves a phone number to one or more Supabase Auth email addresses by querying the profiles table and fetching user records via the admin API, enabling phone-based login flows where email is the actual auth credential.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that sends transactional SMS notifications to clients for sales invoices and payment receipts via Africa's Talking API, enforcing JWT authentication, tenant isolation, phone allowlists, and dynamic message formatting in KSH.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Enforces strict tenant boundary checks by comparing the calling user's tenant_id with the target client's tenant_id before sending any SMS, preventing cross-tenant data leakage.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Supabase Edge Function that bootstraps a new tenant on first user signup: validates input with Zod, creates or reuses a tenant record, creates the user's profile, and assigns the 'admin' role to the first user of the tenant.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses Zod for schema validation of input fields; handles idempotency by checking for existing tenants (by phone number) and existing profiles before inserting, preventing duplicate records on retry.

fileNodes.name: tailwind.config.ts
fileNodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system for the application: custom semantic color tokens mapped to CSS variables (supporting dark mode via class), custom font families (Outfit and Plus Jakarta Sans), border radius tokens, and keyframe animations including accordion and floating effects.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses CSS variable-based color tokens (hsl(var(--token))) so the palette can be overridden per theme without recompiling Tailwind; includes shadcn/ui-compatible sidebar color tokens.

fileNodes.name: vite.config.ts
fileNodes.summary: Vite build configuration enabling the React SWC plugin for fast compilation, the Lovable component tagger in development mode, and a path alias mapping '@' to the 'src' directory.
